behavior.effect: The command surface gains an export command.

tests.effect: CLI behavior needs focused regression coverage.

documentation.effect: CLI documentation must explain the export command.

configuration.reason: No runtime configuration or defaults change.

packaging.effect: Completion and release binary outputs must include the command.

releaseArtifacts.effect: The changelog must announce the new command.

migrations.reason: No persisted schema or data format changes.

operationalStartup.reason: No startup or deployment path changes.

evaluations.effect: Evaluation cases must exercise export behavior.

userWorkflows.effect: The end-to-end export workflow changes for users.
